name: service registration successful

testSteps.description: 1: service registration successful ({name="Beautiful Nails", description="Uñas bonitas a precio bajo"})

children.description: Given that I am on the service registration page
When I enter the "Beautiful Nails" and the "Uñas bonitas a precio bajo" about the service
Then I can see a message indicating that the service was successfully registered
